form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Vaal January 29 over 2000m, 4 len behind Jordan with 58kg at $21. Previously first up; fifth of 9 at Turffontein Standside July 19 over 2000m, 6 len behind The Ultimate King with 62kg at $13.50. Unlikely to trouble the top few.

form.formComment: At the latest run 2nd of 12 at Vaal on March 26 over 1800m, slow going 1.75 len behind World Of Royalty with 56kg at $9. Before that ran last of 13 at Kenilworth on January 31 over 2000m, 14 len behind Note To Self with 60kg at $21. Making headway. Likely to measure up again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Saddle slipped back in running, placing Jockey C Orffer at a disadvantage.
Raced without cover until leaving the 1000m.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start 6th of 13 at Vaal on March 5 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Councillor carrying 60kg at $15. Before that 6th of 9 at Turffontein Standside on February 7 over 1600m, 6 len behind Errol Flynn carrying 60kg at $8. Goes well course and distance. Has the ability to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start 6th of 13 at Vaal on March 5 over 2000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Councillor carrying 60kg at $15. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 300m, carried out marginally by Paul Revere.

form.formComment: At the latest run 8th of 12 at Vaal on March 26 over 1800m, slow going 6 len behind World Of Royalty with 58kg at $15. The race before that won by a neck at Vaal February 10 over 1800m defeating Force Publique carrying 62kg at $7. One of the roughies.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). At the latest run 8th of 12 at Vaal on March 26 over 1800m, slow going 6 len behind World Of Royalty with 58kg at $15. The race before that won by a neck at Vaal February 10 over 1800m defeating Force Publique carrying 62kg at $7. One of the roughies.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 10th of 12 at Vaal on March 26 over 1800m, on a slow track; 12 len behind World Of Royalty with 59kg at $26. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Turffontein Standside on January 3 over 1800m, 8 len behind The Playboy Bomber carrying 57.5kg at $9.50. Fitter but must improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Most recently 12th of 14 at Turffontein Standside on March 14 over 2000m, 21 len behind Curious Girl with 58.5kg at $26. The start before that 6th of 13 at this track on February 19 over 2000m, 8 len behind Mount Etna carrying 59kg at $4. This is well within her grasp.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Most recently 12th of 14 at Turffontein Standside on March 14 over 2000m, 21 len behind Curious Girl with 58.5kg at $26. The start before that 6th of 13 at this track on February 19 over 2000m, 8 len behind Mount Etna carrying 59kg at $4. This is well within her grasp.

form.formComment: Last start 2nd of 10 at Vaal on March 28 over 1700m, neck behind Chieftain's Shield carrying 60kg at $11. The start before that 8th of 12 at this track on February 19 over 1450m, 5 len behind Fostinovo with 58.5kg at $11. Must be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Last start 2nd of 10 at Vaal on March 28 over 1700m, neck behind Chieftain's Shield carrying 60kg at $11. The start before that 8th of 12 at this track on February 19 over 1450m, 5 len behind Fostinovo with 58.5kg at $11. Must be respected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in away from the crop from the 300m to the 200m.
Raced wide around the turn and into the straight, and tired badly.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start won by 3 len at this track March 19 over 1800m defeating We Are The Logans carrying 57.5kg at $4.50. Before that 2nd of 9 at this track on February 26 over 1600m, 1.0 len behind Fully Loaded with 52kg at $13.50. In top form and ideally placed to make it two on the trot.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 300m, steadied when awkwardly placed on the inside of Agoge.

form.formComment: Most recently 3rd of 12 at Vaal on March 26 over 1800m, slow going 4 len behind World Of Royalty carrying 55kg at $13.50. Before that 11th of 14 at this track on February 19 over 2000m, 10 len behind Casus Belli with 61.5kg at $9. Good effort last start and can build on that performance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow into stride. Suffered varying degrees of interference leaving the 1500m.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 12 at Vaal on March 26 over 1800m, on a slow track; 5 len behind World Of Royalty carrying 54kg at $4.50. The run before that 6th of 13 at Turffontein Standside in LR on March 14 over 2000m, 5 len behind Diogenes carrying 54kg at $67. Well placed to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: App J Botes accidentally dropped his crop at the 300m.
Shortly after the start, came together and bumped with Space Mission.
